project.name: DIKWP-VITA Mesh OS
project.chinese_name: 段玉聪个性化开源数字生命与分布式生命力增强系统
project.purpose: 将访问、下载、运行、复现、反例、修复、引用、镜像和非创始维护编译为可审计、可联邦的开放数字生命力。

delivery.word_specification: docs/段玉聪_DIKWP-VITA_MESH_OS_个性化开源数字生命与分布式生命力增强系统_v1.0_CN_最终版.docx

source_qa.clean_editable_install: passed in isolated venv with system site packages
source_qa.schema_validation: passed for sample pulse, public seed state, demo state, proposal items and federation bundle
source_qa.minimal_access_adapter: incremental offset scan and packet generation passed
source_qa.docker_image_build: not executed because no Docker/Podman daemon was available in the validation environment

privacy_and_integrity_controls: Opening the dashboard always increases local vitality without a network request.
Public browser pulses require explicit opt-in and use daily-rotating anonymous node_id and day_token values.
The reference collector does not intentionally persist IP, cookie, user-agent, name, email or precise location.
HTTP access logs are disabled by default in the reference CLI.
Optional mirror aggregation uses timestamp, method, URI and status only; raw logs are not uploaded.
Public ledger payloads are limited to 16 KiB and low-cost anonymous events are daily capped.
Signed packets use Ed25519; event history is deduplicated by event_id and checkpointed with a Merkle root.
EvolutionProposal objects cannot self-approve or automatically change high-impact governance rules.
known_boundaries: An off-platform access or download cannot be observed unless the host exposes aggregate metrics or submits a receipt.
Page views, downloads, stars and the vitality score are not evidence of scientific truth, human value or phenomenal consciousness.
A public deployment still needs HTTPS, proxy-level rate limits, backups, key management and named accountable stewards.
Repository author, organization, license coverage, collector operator and public privacy notice must be confirmed before release.
The package is a reference implementation; it has not been deployed to or endorsed by Yucong Duan, Hainan University, WAAC or WCAC as part of this validation.
